_comment: Spec 013 / T10 — sanitised Tesla-Playwright board envelope mirrored from `/cua-api/apps/careers/state` and consumed via the Playwright in-page `fetch()` path. 10 listings spanning 6 distinct `lookup.locations` keys (Palo Alto / Austin / Fremont / Remote-US / Berlin / Shanghai), 5 `lookup.departments` keys (Engineering / Manufacturing / Sales & Service / Software & IT / Vehicle Service) and 3 `lookup.regions` keys (Americas / EMEA / APAC). Listing 300009 has `d: null` and 300010 has `l: null` to exercise `toJobPost()`'s defensive null-fallback paths (mirrors source-tesla T08's listings 200049 / 200050 with the OPT-IN ID range 300xxx so cross-fixture grep stays unambiguous). Local copy of the source-tesla envelope shape — duplicated here per AGENTS.md §5 'no peer plugin imports'. PII removed; titles + IDs are illustrative.
